events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Scenario: Panelboard installation & makeup, rough-complete, photos show installed work following detail, clearances, labels, supports, terminations in place, inspection card no open correction. Reference NEC Art. 408, 110.26, 200.4. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Since described as compliant, no defects, decision pass. Risk low. Work stage rough-complete. percent_complete maybe 85? Rough-complete installed but not closed out. component_conditions none flagged -> empty list. value 0. confidence high 0.95. findings empty. actions empty. rationale brief. references NEC Art. 408, 110.26, 200.4. Need ensure JSON valid.
